resources.title: AI Doesn't Reduce Work – It Intensifies It
resources.author: Aruna Ranganathan & Xingqi Maggie Ye
resources.description: Eight-month study of AI tool adoption at a tech company. Found work intensified rather than decreased.

resources.title: Class-Action Suit Claims Otter AI Secretly Records Private Work Conversations
resources.description: Otter's transcription app asks the host for recording permission but not other participants. Lawsuit alleges recordings are used to train AI models without consent. 25 million users.

resources.title: AI Is Destroying the University and Learning Itself
resources.description: 60% of surveyed students now admit to using AI to cheat, up from 40% a year ago.

resources.title: SACHRP Terminated in HHS Restructuring
resources.description: The federal advisory committee for human research protections was terminated. Its 2024 recommendations on AI in human subjects research still stand, but the mechanism for updating guidance no longer exists.

resources.title: Take It Down Act Signed Into Law
resources.description: Federal law requiring platforms to remove nonconsensual intimate images and deepfakes. Platforms must comply by May 2026. The DEFIANCE Act adds a right to sue creators.

resources.title: EVAH Initiative: $60M for Locally-Led AI Evaluation in LMICs
resources.description: $60M initiative funding locally-led AI evaluation capacity in LMICs. Administered by J-PAL. Only 4 of 86 AI health RCTs have been conducted in LMICs.

resources.title: AI Medical Tools Show Bias and Potential for Patient Harm
resources.description: Nine AI programs tested on 1,000 ER cases. Recommendations changed based on race, gender, and income rather than the medical condition.

resources.title: EU AI Act Enforcement Begins
resources.description: Prohibited practices banned February 2025. Financial penalties from August 2025. High-risk system requirements from August 2026.

resources.title: WHO Launches EIOS 2.0 for Outbreak Detection
resources.description: AI-powered epidemic intelligence platform, rebuilt with new data sources including speech-to-text for radio communications. Used by 110+ countries for early outbreak detection.

resources.title: WEF Launches Pandemic Preparedness Engine with Agentic AI
resources.description: End-to-end platform integrating genomic surveillance, epidemiological modeling, and vaccine development. Agentic AI framework for outbreak dynamics estimation. Part of CEPI's 100 Days Mission.

resources.title: Global Health Governance in the Age of AI
resources.description: How AI is reshaping global health governance structures – surveillance, resource allocation, and the power dynamics between institutions that build AI and those that deploy it.
